items.title: Jazz Heritage
items.description: A cultural lesson on the roots, creativity, and influence of jazz.

quiz.q: Jazz is most closely connected to what?
quiz.explanation: Jazz is known for creativity and improvisation.

quiz.q: Why is jazz included in cultural heritage lessons?
choices: It shaped music and culture deeply
It is only a dance move
quiz.explanation: Jazz had a deep impact on music and culture.

quiz.q: A key feature of jazz is what?
quiz.explanation: Improvisation is a defining part of jazz.

quiz.q: Jazz helps students learn about what?
quiz.explanation: Jazz connects art, history, and culture.

choices: It carries an important cultural legacy
It belongs only to one city
It is a type of machine
quiz.explanation: It represents an important cultural legacy.

items.title: Hip-Hop Heritage
items.description: A lesson on creativity, storytelling, rhythm, and cultural influence in hip-hop.

quiz.q: Hip-hop is often studied as what?
choices: A cultural movement and music form
quiz.explanation: Hip-hop is much more than music; it is a cultural movement.

quiz.q: Why is hip-hop included in heritage lessons?
choices: It shaped language, style, art, and storytelling
quiz.explanation: Hip-hop influenced many parts of culture.

quiz.q: A central strength of hip-hop is what?
quiz.explanation: Hip-hop is strongly tied to storytelling and expression.

quiz.q: What can students learn from hip-hop heritage?
choices: How culture influences identity and voice
quiz.explanation: It helps students see how culture shapes identity and voice.

quiz.q: Why does hip-hop matter in education?
choices: It connects art, history, and lived experience
quiz.explanation: Hip-hop can connect art, history, and lived experience.
